title: ctenitis pauciflora
intro: Ctenitis pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered ctenitis or few-flowered wood fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis pauciflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Ctenitis pauciflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
